title: Cobblecenters for Cobblemon
description: This datapack adds Scarlet/Violet inspired pokécenters throughout the overworld, allowing the player to heal their team while on the road.
body:
## Features:
This is an addon for the mod Cobblemon.
This datapack adds Scarlet/Violet inspired pokécenters throughout the overworld, allowing the player to heal their team and access their storage while on the road.

## Mod support:
In theory the structures should spawn in every biome in the overworld, including biomes added by other mods.
Tested with Terralith only.

## Known issues:
Pokécenters spawn in aquatic biomes.

## Manual installation:
This pack can be installed the same way as any datapack. Select the datapack while creating a new world.
Can be added on an existing world, but only newly generated terrain will contain the structures.

## Automatic installation:
Add cobblecenters to the modpack.
Install a datapack loader mod, such as "Global Packs", to automatically activate any datapacks.
Can be added on an existing world, but only newly generated terrain will contain the structures.

## Permissions:
Feel free to add to any modpacks.
